jobs.title: Bank of Baroda Churu Attender Vacancy Form 2026, Apply Now
selection_process: The recruitment process may include the following steps:
jobs.application_address: Send the application to The Director, Baroda Swarojgar Vikas Sansthan, RSETI Churu, Khasra No. 271, Sector-1, Near Roadways Bus Stand, Sainik Basti, Churu – 331001 (Rajasthan) by 5:00 PM on July 20, 2026.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully.
Prepare the application on plain paper or use the prescribed format.
Fill in all the required information correctly.
Attach self-attested copies of the required documents.
Must superscribe the envelope with “Application for the Post of Attender at BSVS at RSETI Churu on Contractual Basis.”

Send the application to The Director, Baroda Swarojgar Vikas Sansthan, RSETI Churu, Khasra No. 271, Sector-1, Near Roadways Bus Stand, Sainik Basti, Churu – 331001 (Rajasthan) by 5:00 PM on July 20, 2026.
jobs.jobs_info: Bank of Baroda Churu Attender Vacancy Form 2026: If you’ve passed 10th grade and are looking for a job in a bank-related organization, this is a good opportunity for you. Baroda Swarojgar Vikas Sansthan (BSVS), Churu, a RSETI institute sponsored by Bank of Baroda, has released a notification for the post of Attender on a contractual basis. A total of 01 position will be filled under this recruitment. Interested candidates can submit applications offline until July 20, 2026, at 5:00 PM. Selected candidates will receive a starting salary of ₹14,000 per month, which can reach up to ₹19,000 per month with annual increases. If you meet the eligibility criteria, please apply before the deadline.

Under this recruitment drive, eligible candidates will be selected for a total of 21 posts. The application process has been kept offline, and interested candidates can send their applications to the prescribed address by July 27, 2026. Posts in all three categories – medical, paramedical, and non-medical – have been included in this recruitment.

jobs.title: Northern Railway ATVM Facilitator Vacancy 2026, Apply Now
how_to_apply: Visit the official Northern Railway website at www.nr.indianrailways.gov.in or the link below.
Download the tender form and the document containing all terms and conditions.
Fill out the application form accurately with all the required details.
Submit your completed application in the designated tender box at the office by 10 August 2026.
Ensure the submission is made strictly between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM on the deadline date.

Applicants must provide a refundable security deposit of Rs. 50,000/- for NSG-1 and NSG-2 stations or Rs. Rs. 25,000/- for other categories, payable to the Sr. Divisional Finance Manager, Ambala Cantt, via Demand Draft, Fixed Deposit, or Money Receipt. This deposit is refundable upon contract completion after adjusting any pending dues, but it will be forfeited if the facilitator expresses an inability to operate the machine after being engaged.

jobs.title: NBEMS Vacancy 2026, Check Eligibility & How to Apply
selection_process: Skill Test (if required for a specific post)
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://natboard.edu.in/recruitment
Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage.
First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password.
After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable).
Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking].
Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors.
After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

In accordance with the information provided below, approval has been granted under the Joint Director (POSHAN) letter no. MD/POSHAN/22200-22208 (dated 18-06-2026) to fill various vacant positions of *Sangini* (Anganwadi Worker) and *Sahayika* (Anganwadi Helper) at Anganwadi centers in Chadoora under the POSHAN project: All relevant information regarding the JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

jobs.title: CBI Forensic Advisor Vacancy 2026, Check Eligibility & How to Apply
jobs.salary_pay_scale: Forensic Advisor: Rs. Rs 1,00,000/- per month
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.
The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.”
The application should be submitted to: spsystems@cbi.gov.in
jobs.jobs_info: CBI Forensic Advisor Vacancy 2026: CBI invites applications from Indian nationals for engagement as Forensic Advisor on a short-term contract basis at CBI Headquarters, New Delhi. The required details and eligibility criteria are given below: All relevant information regarding the CBI Forensic Advisor Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Master’s degree in Forensic Science from a recognized university; or a Master’s degree in Science, Engineering, Technology, Medicine, Law, Criminology, or a related field from a recognized university, along with specialized qualifications, training, or substantial experience in Forensic Science.At least 2 years of experience in providing expert forensic advice and assistance in criminal investigat
